arts.ttl: Newcastle United given 'pathetic' Leicester message as pundits agree
arts.sum: The Premier League pundits are unanimous in their verdict that Newcastle United will stroll to victory against Leicester City tonight. Not that it has affected the predictions of the Paul Merson, Chris Sutton and Joe Cole - here's what they've had to say.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak squad update as Newcastle United stars arrive at Leicester
arts.sum: Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak has arrived at the King Power Stadium ahead of the Magpies' clash with Leicester City tonight. When asked about Isak's busy international programme last month and whether it had any bearing on the injury, Howe played down any such suggestion.

arts.ttl: Transfer likely after boos – Tottenham, Newcastle and Nottingham Forest can tussle for midfielder
arts.sum: AC Milan’s Yunus Musah had a terrible game in Serie A against Fiorentina at the weekend and his situation is now attracting interest from Tottenham, Newcastle United and Nottingham Forest. During Milan’s 2-2 draw against La Viola, Musah made a major error that led to Fiorentina taking the lead early in the tie. Minutes after The post Transfer likely after boos – Tottenham, Newcastle and Nottingham Forest can tussle for midfielder appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leicester v Newcastle: All you need to know
arts.sum: On Leicester's form: " It is not going well, the results are bad, but I think as a team we stick together and this is the most important. Leicester : The Foxes have a relatively clean bill of health, with Abdul Fatawu the only player ruled out.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Newcastle Betting Preview: Isak and co. to pummel floundering Foxes
arts.sum: Leicester welcome Newcastle to the King Power Stadium this evening, hoping to put an end to their current, ongoing run of seven Premier League matches without scoring a goal. The Foxes have also l...

arts.ttl: Craig Bellamy's Newcastle regret, not speaking to Alan Shearer, Feyenoord winner, golf club attack
arts.sum: Speaking to Gary Neville during an instalment of The Overlap, Bellamy explained: "Because I know all the players he's [Robson] coached, and obviously I grew up watching 1990, then you sort of learn a little bit more before your Robsons and everything like that with '86, '88. Bellamy claims Newcastle legend Alan Shearer didn't speak to him for weeks after signing for the club and didn't get the reception he felt he deserved from the number nine.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United alerted to £25m release clause of star after Southampton's relegation confirmed
arts.sum: But as Pope's knee strengthened Howe slowly eased the former Burnley star back between the posts and it was the England international who faced Liverpool in the final. Back in January it looked like Martin Dubravka was on his way out at St James' Park with an offer from Al-Shabab on the table.

arts.ttl: Odsonne Edouard puts Celtic on transfer alert as ridiculousness of Leicester City nightmare beggars belief
arts.sum: The Frenchman is completely out of favour at the Foxes and faces a bleak future at parent club Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Details of Kieran Trippier's Bayern Munich interest emerge after Newcastle United block
arts.sum: Trippier's presence has been key during the club's Carabao Cup final victory over Liverpool and his experience is set to be vital for the Champions League run-in. Howe said: "I don't think there was any big PSR benefit to selling Kieran and I think that was factored into a lot of our decision making.
